title: Clongcraft
body:
[SERVER SIDE HERE](https://modrinth.com/modpack/clongcraftserver/version/PRkmTIdg)

This modpack is meant for people who want to play a (subjectively) improved Minecraft, yet still maintaining the feeling you get when playing vanilla Minecraft. Improved world generation, mob and village diversification, new biomes, and quality of life improvements are the name of the game. This is a modpack that should ideally be able to update over time with new Minecraft versions, and I tried to set it up in a way that even if something has to be taken off, it shouldn't be an experience-ruining change.

Links to Non-Modrinth Mods:
- [Spelunker's Charm II](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/spelunkers-charm-ii)
- [More Villagers](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/more-villagers)
- [Fresh Animations - Extensions](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/fresh-animations-extensions)
- [Bliss Shader Beta](https://github.com/X0nk/Bliss-Shader/releases/tag/Release8)
- [Distant Horizons Server Fork Gitlab, will be merged with main mod at some point](https://gitlab.com/s809/minecraft-lod-mod/-/wikis/home)
